feature: Each column has a collapse toggle
last_worker_summary: The root cause was that Jira CSS-hides the collapse buttons until a column header is hovered. I fixed `tests/board/columns.collapse.spec.mjs` by adding `await <heading>.hover()` before every `toBeVisible()` check and before the `.click()` on the collapse button — this triggers the ancestor `:hover` state that reveals the action buttons — while keeping the full mutate → verify-post → revert → verify-revert sequence intact across 7 `expect()` calls.
mutation_failure_reason: saboteur made no edits AND spec did not re-pass after no-op revert (exit=1)
